message:
feat(ffs-ondisk): add validated inode location helpers (bd-8tr)

Add locate_inode() and inode_device_offset() to Ext4Superblock for
safe, validated inode-to-device-offset computation. Validates inode
number bounds (0 invalid, > inodes_count rejected) and uses checked
arithmetic throughout. Add InodeLocation struct for the result.

7 new tests covering boundary inodes (first, last-in-group, group
crossing), invalid inputs, and absolute device offset computation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -14,7 +14,8 @@ pub use ext4::{
     DirBlockIter, Ext4CompatFeatures, Ext4DirEntry, Ext4DirEntryRef, Ext4DirEntryTail, Ext4DxEntry,
     Ext4DxRoot, Ext4Extent, Ext4ExtentHeader, Ext4ExtentIndex, Ext4FileType, Ext4GroupDesc,
     Ext4ImageReader, Ext4IncompatFeatures, Ext4Inode, Ext4RoCompatFeatures, Ext4Superblock,
-    Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree, FeatureDiagnostics, dx_hash, iter_dir_block, lookup_in_dir_block,
-    parse_dir_block, parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree, parse_inode_extent_tree,
+    Ext4Xattr, ExtentTree, FeatureDiagnostics, InodeLocation, dx_hash, iter_dir_block,
+    lookup_in_dir_block, parse_dir_block, parse_dx_root, parse_extent_tree,
+    parse_inode_extent_tree, verify_dir_block_checksum, verify_extent_block_checksum,
     verify_group_desc_checksum, verify_inode_checksum,
 };
